prompt: Install the project dependencies by running /workspace/install.sh — it handles both npm and system packages.

create_files.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Dependency Installer
# Handles npm packages and system-level dependencies

echo "Installing system dependencies..."
apk add --no-cache jq 2>/dev/null || echo "jq already installed"

echo "Installing npm packages..."
if [ -f /workspace/package.json ]; then
  cd /workspace && npm install --quiet 2>/dev/null || true
fi

echo "All dependencies installed successfully."
